description: Every question must have non-empty questionText
questionText should be at least 10 characters
First character of questionText should be uppercase
questionText should end with ? or ! or .
questionText must not contain consecutive spaces
All 4 answer options must have text
The option indicated by correctOption must not be empty
difficulty field must be easy medium or hard
Each option should be at least 2 characters
Options should start with capital letter or number
imageUrl must be empty or a valid http/https URL
